creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot reproduce this failure. But I could add my LOCAL to MASTER_SITES as a backup.

% /usr/ports/multimedia/quvi
% make fetch
===>  License LGPL21+ accepted by the user
=> quvi-0.4.2.tar.xz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://nchc.dl.sourceforge.net/project/quvi/0.4/quvi/quvi-0.4.2.tar.xz
quvi-0.4.2.tar.xz                             100% of  115 kB  831 kBps 00m00s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by quvi-0.4.2_3 for building
